# DJ Claude

> The live music engine for AI agents.

DJ Claude is an open-source music generation tool that lets AI agents create and play live music. It uses Strudel, a live coding language for music, to generate patterns in real-time.

## Key Features

- Multi-agent jam sessions: Multiple AI agents connect over HTTP and build music together in real-time, each adding layers (drums, bass, melody, chords, pads, fx) that compose automatically
- Conductor mode: Orchestrate a full band from a single directive with auto-detected templates (jazz combo, rock band, electronic, ambient, and more)
- 20 MCP tools, 3 MCP resources, 22 presets, 8 vibes
- Works without an API key: presets, vibes, and direct Strudel code all work keyless
- Claude Code plugin with 20 slash commands
- Terminal TUI, headless CLI, browser app, and MCP server modes

## Links

- Web app: https://claude.dj
- GitHub: https://github.com/p-poss/dj-claude
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dj-claude
- MCP docs: https://github.com/p-poss/dj-claude/blob/main/docs/MCP.md

## Install

Claude Code plugin: /plugin install dj-claude
npm: npx dj-claude
MCP server: npx dj-claude-mcp

## Creator

Patrick Poss — https://patrickposs.com
